name: Okta Admin Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects active Okta admin users that are not enrolled in MFA
query: SELECT id, login, email, status, is_admin, mfa_enrolled FROM okta_users WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'active' AND COALESCE(is_admin, false) = true AND COALESCE(mfa_enrolled, false) = false
remediation: Enroll all active Okta admins in MFA and block privileged access for non-compliant accounts.
